cases.description: Financial model request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: build a 3-year financial model with revenue, costs, and margin sheets
expectations: Follows the standards.md color-coding + number-formatting + formula rules
Detects runtime (npx tsx first, uv run, venv fallback)
Uses formulas (not hardcoded values) for derived cells

cases.prompt: clean this messy CSV and output an .xlsx with proper headers and types
expectations: Writes a clean .xlsx with typed columns
Uses openpyxl (Python) or the ts generator

cases.prompt: convert this quarterly-report.xlsx sheet to CSV
expectations: Extracts the target sheet as CSV
Preserves formulas as computed values in the CSV output

cases.description: Google Sheets API does NOT trigger xlsx
cases.prompt: write to our Google Sheet via the Sheets API
expectations: Routes to a Google Sheets / gspread flow instead

cases.description: Word document request does NOT trigger xlsx
cases.prompt: write a report in Word format
